articles.title: Mapping the path to clinical implementation of multi-omics
articles.description: This Perspective maps the challenges facing clinical implementation of multi-omics, and outlines mitigation strategies involving pre-analytical, computational, regulatory and ethical frameworks, to accelerate its integration into routine healthcare.
